page.title: Resources
card.description.docs: Learn how to develop with 8th Wall and access detailed documentation for 8th Wall's JavaScript API.
card.description.forum: Join the 8th Wall Discourse forum. Get support, ask questions, and share projects.
card.description.tutorials: Master 8th Wall development with helpful quick tips and in-depth video tutorials from our support team.
card.description.project_library: Get started with 8th Wall by viewing code and cloning sample projects from the 8th Wall Project Library.
card.description.questions: Email support@8thwall.com to contact a member of our team and we will respond shortly.
card.description.courses: Learn 8th Wall from bottom up with complete how to courses.
card.description.community: Connect with developers, engage in discussions, and get expert advice on innovating with 8th Wall.
card.description.blog: Read the latest announcements, find inspiration and get featured
